title: First-of-its-Kind SAF Production Policy on The Anvil in India's U.P.
content: The Yogi Adityanath government in UP will introduce the UP SAF Manufacturing Promotion Policy-2025, positioning the state as a hub for green aviation fuel production. By leveraging local agricultural residues and surplus grains as feedstock, the policy promises rural income growth alongside clean energy advancement.
author: Analysts Account
